message:
fix(frankenterm-core): guard erase_range against OOB row + add proptest invariants

Proptest discovered a panic in Grid::erase_range when start_row >= self.rows
(e.g., erase_line_right(row=1, col=0, bg) on a 1x1 grid). The clamped row
index could equal self.rows, causing an out-of-bounds cell access.

Adds 19 property-based tests covering parser safety, cursor bounds, grid
operations, scrollback capacity, and full pipeline determinism. Includes
regression seed for the discovered bug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc eec233010674d9dc12d663281398f387f9fd506d29f38ca81d3d0ebd1ab9b181 # shrinks to (cols, rows) = (1, 1), row = 1, col = 0, mode = 0
